description.value:
The youngest of age of all the Great Clans, their sp ecialization of the spear and blade are renowned for being agile and incredible subtle, while still maintaining a great deal of power behind their attacks. Outside of the battle field they are known to be quick witted and frequently expected to join in a d ebate with harsh reminding words to others that everyone should remain humble.

Source: Mechanics/Character_Options/Occupations/Community Compendium/Samurai Clans/Mantis Clan.md

Category: Community Compendium

Folder: Samurai Clans

Prerequisite: Age 8+

Class Skills: Select 3 from Balance, Chakra Control, Climb, Iaijutsu Focus, Knowledge (Tactics), Listen, Swim.

Feat: Select one from Alertness, [Universal: Defensive Stance], (Improved Trick, Whirlwind Attack), Dodge (Dodge, Spring Attack), Improved Initiative, [Universal: Risky Strike] (Cleave, Great Cleave), Quick Draw, Weapon Focus (katana, kodachi, any polearm, wakizashi).

Wealth Bonus Increase: +1

Reputation Bonus Increase: +1

Affiliation: If a Mantis Clan member takes levels in Samurai his skills listed above become part of his Class Skills for Samurai levels as well as his Class Skills. His Fortitude save becomes Average, his Reflex save becomes Good and his Will becomes Poor. All feats listed above become feats he may select from the Bonus Feats granted by the Samurai class. The Mantis who takes wields a spear gains the ability to use the Swing Around ability. Swing Around (Ex): On any unsuccessful attack with a *polearm* except on a charge, a Mantis may make a second attack, swinging the polearm around to hit his enemy with the blunt side of the weapon, albeit a -4penalty and at a 5 feet range. This attack deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage, plus his strength modifier. Weapon enhancements and special weapon abilities do not apply to this attack.

featOptions: Weapon Focus (katana, kodachi, any polearm, wakizashi)
